name: Share Your Feature Ideas.
about: Suggest an idea for this project !

---

Do you have an idea for something missing in DSP .opsnh?
Or would you like a new feature in the editor?

Describe your idea here!

Informations
- In my free time I add features that I think are must-have.
- If you've created any cool plugins, I'd be happy to add them with your permission.
- If your idea gets implemented, I will credit you.

Please be respectful and don't be unkind to others.
